Document:
# Other Systems Reference
Quick reference for miscellaneous systems in OpenEdge 14.
## OE14Farming
Plant growth system with energy cycles and harvest mechanics. Plants grow through stages based on light and water availability.
[bold]Key components:[/bold] OE14PlantComponent, OE14SeedComponent [bold]Files:[/bold] [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Farming/[/mono]
## Status Effects
Status effects (Burning, Frozen, Poisoned, Bleeding) are applied via the StatusEffect component system.
[bold]Applying a status effect:[/bold]
_statusEffect.TryAddStatusEffect(uid, "Burning", TimeSpan.FromSeconds(5), true);
## OE14Vampire
Vampire role mechanics — special abilities, feeding, and transformation. Vampires have unique skill trees.
[bold]Files:[/bold] [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Vampire/[/mono]
## OE14Demiplane
Dimensional travel system. Players or entities can be transported to a pocket dimension.
[bold]Files:[/bold] [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Demiplane/[/mono]
## Content Under Construction
Detailed documentation for each system coming soon.
